title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Fit Test is present
scenario: Verify the Fit Test screen appears in the onboarding flow with Skip/Test options matching the Figma design.
steps: Start the app with a device that supports fit test connected.
Navigate to the Fit test screen (after Pairing 2 screen).
Verify the screen matches the Figma design with Skip/Test options at the bottom.
expected: Fit Test screen is present in the onboarding flow and matches the Figma design with Skip/Test options at the bottom.
